scenarios.description: two-level tree descends then ascends exercising descend branch (B11→B12) and tail on return
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called for root and child; visitor.tail called for child then root, no errors
pseudocode: TEST TC12 two-level descent and ascent
public void head(Node node, int depth) { head.add(node.nodeName()+":"+depth); }
public void tail(Node node, int depth) { tail.add(node.nodeName()+":"+depth); }

scenarios.description: node with children triggers assertionError in interior when assertions disabled flag path (B11→B13→B14→B15)
scenarios.precondition: none, ensure class assertions usage default
scenarios.expectedResult: AssertionError is thrown upon encountering first child with children
pseudocode: public void head(Node node, int depth) { /* no-op */ }
public void tail(Node node, int depth) { /* no-op */ }

scenarios.description: three-level chain with no siblings exercises ascend-loop branch (B16→B17→B19→B13)
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head/tail invoked in correct depths without infinite loop
pseudocode: TEST TC14 deep chain ascend loop
public void head(Node node, int depth) { head.add(node.nodeName()+":"+depth); }
public void tail(Node node, int depth) { tail.add(node.nodeName()+":"+depth); }

scenarios.description: multiple siblings exercises sibling-null ascend then tail on non-root (B16→B20→B21)
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head/tail called for each sibling and root, no errors
pseudocode: public void head(Node node, int depth) { head.add(node.nodeName()+":"+depth); }
public void tail(Node node, int depth) { tail.add(node.nodeName()+":"+depth); }
